question.label: Exploring mentoring
question.name: How can we better support your interest in mentoring? What steps would you like to see taken?
question.description: Aims to uncover ways to facilitate Priya's mentoring aspirations and address her concerns.

answer: Payments was real — I owned the migration plan and made the call on the dual-write window. I'm proud of how that went.

assessment.note: Priya expressed pride in her contributions to the payments refactor, indicating a positive sense of growth.

new_queue.label: Recognizing contributions
new_queue.name: What aspect of the payments refactor are you most proud of, and how do you think it impacted the team?

new_queue.label: Checking in on blockers
new_queue.name: Are there any blockers or challenges you're currently facing that we should address?

history.answer_excerpt: Last two weeks were intense — shipping payments was a sprint but it landed clean. Mostly good energy but definitely coasting a bit this week
